title: ROADMAP Phase 0: Critical Fixes
description: Fix 8 critical issues blocking public release: port inconsistency, Python injection, safety gap, lint reference, version harmonization, engines field, tokenize dedup, trademark disclaimer

stories.title: Group 1: Port fix + Trademark + Lint ref removal (README.md shared)
acceptanceCriteria: README.md uses UE_WS_PORT and 9877 in mcp.json example (not UMA_WS_PORT or 8765)
docs/index.html uses UE_WS_PORT and 9877 (not UMA_WS_PORT or 8765)
docs/coding-conventions/README.md has no references to 8765 (lines 85, 719, 1022 fixed to 9877)
docs/websocket-protocol.md line 519 uses 9877 (not 8765)
docs/api-reference/mcp-tools.md line 1592 uses 9877 (not 8765)
grep -rn 'UMA_WS_PORT' . --include='*.md' --include='*.html' --include='*.ts' returns zero results (excluding ROADMAP.md)
grep -rn '8765' . --include='*.md' --include='*.html' --include='*.ts' --include='*.json' returns zero results (excluding ROADMAP.md and node_modules)
README.md contains a Disclaimer section with 'Unreal Engine is a trademark of Epic Games, Inc.'
README.md does not reference npm run lint (line ~268 removed or updated)
npm run typecheck passes
npm run test passes (all 928+ tests)

stories.title: Group 2: Add engines field to mcp-server/package.json
acceptanceCriteria: mcp-server/package.json contains engines field with node >=20.0.0
npm run typecheck passes
npm run test passes

stories.title: Group 3: Fix Python code injection in UMAPythonBridge.cpp
acceptanceCriteria: UMAPythonBridge.cpp no longer contains r'''%s''' pattern for params (grep returns 0)
Python params are passed via base64 encoding: C++ encodes JSON string, Python decodes via base64.b64decode
The Python import line includes base64 module
No raw string interpolation of user-controlled content in Python exec code

stories.title: Group 4: Classify actor-setArrayRef in safety.ts
acceptanceCriteria: actor-setArrayRef is in the WARN_TOOLS set in mcp-server/src/state/safety.ts
classifyOperation('actor-setArrayRef', {}) returns reason 'Mutation operation' (not 'Unknown operation')
All existing safety tests pass
npm run test passes

stories.title: Group 5: Harmonize version numbers to 0.1.0
acceptanceCriteria: Root package.json version is 0.1.0 (was 0.0.0)
ARCHITECTURE.md Version line shows 0.1.0 (was 0.2.0)
mcp-server/package.json remains 0.1.0 (no change needed)
UnrealMasterAgent.uplugin remains 0.1.0 (no change needed)

stories.title: Group 6: Extract shared tokenize() utility
acceptanceCriteria: mcp-server/src/utils/tokenize.ts exists with exported tokenize() function
intent-matcher.ts imports tokenize from ../../utils/tokenize.js (no local function)
error-learning.ts imports tokenize from ../../utils/tokenize.js (no local function)
grep -rn 'function tokenize' mcp-server/src/tools/context/ returns zero results
embedding-store.ts retains its own tokenize with explanatory comment about why it is separate
npm run typecheck passes
npm run test passes (all 928+ tests)
